title: The Reading Noble
description: Elend Venture notices Vin standing alone at a balcony during a ball at his own keep and excuses himself to share it with her. He irritates her by pulling out Trials of Monument and reading while the rest of the nobility dances and schemes around them.

title: An Evening with Valette
description: Elend attends the ball at Keep Elariel where he sits at a table with Vin, reading as usual. He compliments her dress, making her jaw drop.

title: The Handkerchief
description: Elend finds Vin at the ball at Keep Hasting. She confronts him about whether he has ever slept with a skaa woman. He confesses that his father forced him to once at the age of thirteen, and the woman was killed afterward—but he never did it again. He gives Vin a handkerchief, signaling his wish to court her. After leaving with his friends, they ascend a tower to discuss the Lord Ruler's faults and what their generation should do about it.

title: Ball at Keep Lekal
description: Elend surprises Vin at the ball at Keep Lekal. He says he wants to kiss her, but Vin insists he doesn't truly know her. They take a stroll instead, and Elend reveals that House Venture's fortune comes entirely from mining atium at the Pits of Hathsin—trusting her completely with this secret. He also mentions the Tekiels were killed by House Hasting, and tries to convince Valette to leave Luthadel for her safety.

title: Father's Summons
description: Elend returns to Keep Venture and tries to sneak past his father's room. Lord Straff Venture, a Tineye who misses nothing, calls him in. Straff tells Elend he must dine with House Hastings and one of their daughters the next day, as he intends to form an alliance with Lord Tegas. Later, Jastes arrives and reveals he had Lady Valette's carriage followed—it arrived in Fellise with only the Terrisman inside, Valette having vanished. Jastes is convinced she is a spy from another house. Elend, realizing he revealed the atium mining secret, proposes a trade to his father: he'll attend the luncheon in exchange for a couple of spies to follow Valette.

title: The Venture Ball
description: Elend is having dinner with his father at Keep Venture during the ball. Vin gets his attention and they have a confrontation. Elend says things hurt Vin, however when Vin learns the there will be an assassin attemp on Elend's life that event she rushes out into the mist to locate the assassins. The evening ends in chaos when Vin fights and kills Lady Shan Elariel, a mistborn, sent to kill Elend. In the turmoil however, Elend is able to slip away.

title: The Spy Reports
description: Elend receives intelligence from his spies that have been following Vin. He learns that she is part of a skaa thieving group operating near Keep Venture. Despite this revelation, his feelings for her remain complicated.

title: The Execution Carts
description: Elend sees the Renoux servants caged in an execution cart at Fountain Square. He screams after Valette but cannot find her anywhere in the crowd.

title: Kelsier Saves Elend
description: Elend reaches Renoux's cage at Fountain Square and asks after Valette. An Inquisitor lands on the cage and is about to strike Elend with its axe when Kelsier strikes the Inquisitor, saving Elend's life. Kelsier screams to Elend that Valette is fine, and Elend is dragged away by his bodyguards.

title: Authority of House Venture
description: Elend's father tells him a skaa rebellion has begun and wants to flee Luthadel. Elend refuses to leave. His father hands him the authority of House Venture — figuring either the rebellion will kill Elend, or the Lord Ruler will execute him when he discovers the Pits of Hathsin have been destroyed and there is no more atium.

title: Rescuing Vin
description: Elend offers gold to some skaa to be brought to Dockson, telling him that House Venture will not resist the rebellion and they should work together. Later, Elend and six soldiers burst into Kredik Shaw to rescue Vin. The secret is out—he now knows Vin is a Mistborn. Vin grabs his head and kisses him, then turns to go kill the Lord Ruler.

title: The Philosopher King
description: In the aftermath of the Lord Ruler's death, Elend emerges as a unifying voice calling for order. He begins meeting with both skaa and noble leaders to draft a code of law for the new nation.

title: The New King
description: Elend Venture is accepted as King of the Central Dominance after a tremendous speech to skaa and noble leaders. He sits at Keep Venture writing the new code of law for the kingdom. Vin secretly watches him from the mists through the window before dashing to him — they hold each other.

title: King of Luthadel
description: Elend works tirelessly at Keep Venture to establish a constitutional government, drafting laws and building an Assembly while armies gather outside.

title: The Assembly
description: Elend addresses the Assembly he created, advocating for democratic principles even as his advisors warn that democracy may not survive the siege.

title: Surveying the Siege
description: Elend surveys the siege lines from the city walls, watching his father Straff's army to the north and Cett's forces approaching from the west.

title: Fighting for Democracy
description: Elend faces mounting opposition in the Assembly as fear of the siege drives many to seek a stronger leader than a philosopher-king.

title: Parley with Father
description: Elend rides out to Straff Venture's camp to negotiate, bringing Vin as his protector. The meeting reveals Straff's contempt for his idealistic son.

title: Plotting Diplomacy
description: Back at Keep Venture, Elend attempts to play the three armies against each other—Straff, Cett, and the approaching koloss horde.

title: Deposed
description: The Assembly votes to replace Elend with Lord Penrod, exploiting a clause in Elend's own democratic constitution. His idealism proves his undoing.

title: Mission to the Koloss
description: Elend leaves Luthadel through the tunnels to negotiate with Jastes Lekal and his koloss army, a desperate gamble to secure an ally.

title: Return from the Koloss
description: Elend returns from the koloss camp having failed to negotiate—Jastes lost control of his beasts. The koloss will attack regardless.

title: Exile from Luthadel
description: Elend departs Luthadel with Vin through the Tin Gate, exiled by Penrod's government, heading north toward Terris to seek the Keeper synod's aid.

title: The Journey North
description: Elend's party travels toward Terris, but growing unease pushes them to reconsider. The Well of Ascension may not be where they thought.

title: The Battle
description: Elend returns to find Luthadel under koloss assault, fighting through the chaos as the walls are breached and the city threatens to fall.

title: To the Well
description: Elend descends beneath Kredik Shaw with Vin, seeking the Well of Ascension as Marsh fights Sazed above them.

title: The Mistborn Emperor
description: Stabbed and dying at the Well, Elend is saved when Vin forces a bead of lerasium into his mouth, transforming him into a Mistborn.

title: Emperor at War
description: Elend leads his armies to Vetitan, now a Mistborn emperor directing military campaigns to secure the Lord Ruler's hidden supply caches.

title: Securing the Cache
description: Elend secures the Vetitan storage cavern, finding food and a metal plate message warning about the danger Rashek imprisoned.

title: Strategic Division
description: At Luthadel, Elend divides his forces: sending Sazed to secure Urteau diplomatically while he marches west to take Fadrex by force if necessary.

title: The Western March
description: Elend leads his army west toward Fadrex City, the ash falling heavier each day. He trains as a Mistborn during the march.

title: The Siege of Fadrex
description: Elend's army arrives at Fadrex and establishes siege lines on the ash-covered plains. Yomen refuses to negotiate or surrender the cache.

title: The Reluctant Besieger
description: Elend struggles with his role as a conqueror, trying diplomacy even as his generals push for assault. The ashfall grows worse daily.

title: Losing Vin
description: When Vin is captured inside Fadrex, Elend faces an impossible choice between rescuing his wife and protecting tens of thousands of soldiers.

title: Entering Fadrex
description: Koloss attack forces a temporary alliance with Yomen. Elend enters the city and accesses the storage cache, finding the Lord Ruler's final message.

title: Departure for Hathsin
description: With the cache secured and Vin gone east, Elend learns the final truth: the atium must be at the Pits of Hathsin. He marches his army south.

title: March to the Pits
description: Elend leads his exhausted army to the Pits of Hathsin, where the Kandra Homeland lies beneath. Marsh's Inquisitor army follows close behind.

title: The Battle of Hathsin
description: Elend burns the last of the atium in a desperate battle against the Inquisitors and koloss at the Pits, knowing it means his death when the metal runs out.

title: The Emperor's Death
description: Elend is killed by Marsh in the final moments of the Battle of Hathsin, his atium spent. He dies having burned all the metal Ruin sought.

title: Reunited in Death
description: Elend's body is found beside Vin's in the field of flowers—Sazed's first gift to the remade world—at peace after all their struggles.
